# Ivory Digital

> Ivory Digital builds beautiful software and websites for small businesses in the United Kingdom. We offer three services: (1) bespoke, fully branded online booking systems for bridal boutiques and wedding-dress shops, (2) StudioApp — the complete client gallery and photo delivery platform for wedding photographers, and (3) website design & SEO for small businesses at genuinely fair, low prices. We are based in Manchester and support clients nationwide, with no third-party booking-platform subscriptions and no per-booking fees on our booking systems.

## Contact
- Email: sales@ivorydigital.uk
- Phone: +44 7712 117357
- Address: 220 Ashurst Road, Manchester, M22 5AX, United Kingdom
- Website: https://ivorydigital.uk

## Products
- Bridal Boutique Booking System: a privately built, fully branded booking website plus a behind-the-scenes staff diary for bridal boutiques.
- StudioApp: the complete client gallery and photo delivery platform for wedding photographers (galleries, video streaming, guest uploads, automated emails, print sales and activity tracking). Live app and free trial at https://studioappgallery.uk/.
- Website Design & SEO: beautiful, fast, search-optimised websites for small businesses at genuinely fair, low prices — design, build, hosting and SEO. Enquire for a quote.

## Pages
- [Home](https://ivorydigital.uk/): Overview of Ivory Digital and both products.
- [Booking System](https://ivorydigital.uk/booking-system.html): Full feature list — customer booking journey, staff admin panel, availability, analytics, waitlist, notifications and security.
- [StudioApp](https://ivorydigital.uk/studioapp.html): Client gallery & photo delivery software for wedding photographers — features, file formats and pricing.
- [Web Design & SEO](https://ivorydigital.uk/web-design-seo.html): Website design, build, hosting & SEO for small businesses at fair, low prices, with a portfolio of recent sites.
- [Web/SEO Enquiry](https://ivorydigital.uk/web-seo-enquiry.html): Enquiry form to request a website/SEO quote.
- [Pricing](https://ivorydigital.uk/pricing.html): SPECIAL OFFER — Single Boutique £99 initial setup (normally £150), then £15/month (or £140 billed annually); Multi-Boutique (up to three locations) £149 initial setup (normally £200), then £26/month (or £285 billed annually). Limited-time offer.
- [About](https://ivorydigital.uk/about.html): Who we are and how we work.
- [FAQ](https://ivorydigital.uk/faq.html): Common questions about the system, ownership, hosting and support.
- [Contact](https://ivorydigital.uk/contact.html): Get in touch or request a quote.

## Key facts — Bridal Boutique Booking System
- Product: branded appointment-booking website + staff management diary for bridal boutiques.
- Model: one-off setup fee, then a simple monthly (or discounted annual) hosting & maintenance package. No booking-platform subscriptions, no per-booking fees.
- Pricing (special offer): Single Boutique — £99 initial setup (normally £150), then £15/month or £140/year. Multi-Boutique (up to three locations) — £149 initial setup (normally £200), then £26/month or £285/year. Limited-time offer.
- Features: multi-boutique support, no-double-booking engine, capacity & buffers, custom booking questions, automatic email confirmations & reminders, waitlist, CSV export, Google/Apple calendar sync, analytics, secure logins with optional 2FA.

## Key facts — StudioApp
- Product: client gallery and photo delivery platform for wedding photographers. Built by a wedding photographer after delivering 1,600+ weddings.
- Features: unlimited branded galleries, video streaming, guest uploads, secure/expiring share links, QR codes, automated client emails from your own address, print sales, activity tracking, unlimited storage.
- Free 7-day trial, no credit card required, cancel anytime. Start at https://studioappgallery.uk/.
- Pricing (per month, GBP): Starter £15 (10 galleries), Professional £35 (30 galleries), Studio £65 (60 galleries). All plans include unlimited storage, custom branding, guest uploads, activity tracking and free SSL, backups & updates.

## Area served
- United Kingdom.
design, on-page SEO & structured data, local search set-up, secure hosting with SSL/backups, booking/enquiry forms, copywriting and analytics.
- Portfolio examples: Wife To Be (Chester & Cheshire), Wife To Be (Warrington & Runcorn), StudioApp, AM Architectural & Surveying.
